action.reasoning: Observation: Starting with empty workspace, no prior training or eval. Analysis: Must follow workflow - create train.py and predict.py from scratch for first baseline using per-task PPO models (avoids obs dim mismatch), small timesteps (20k/task) + DummyVecEnv to validate pipeline quickly without common pitfalls (no unconditional Monitor, deterministic predict, correct 5-tuple API). Decision: Train minimal multi-task coverage baseline on all 10 tasks, submit eval immediately to get initial success_rate=0 and measure iteration time.
